headline: Xcel Energy: Bigger Capital Plan, Bigger Pushback

headline: Xcel Energy (XEL) Sees Subsidiary Reaching Regulatory Arrangement Around Pricing Dispute
summary: Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XEL) is one of the 11 best regulated electric stocks to buy now. On June 3, a subsidiary of Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XEL), Public Service Company of Colorado, reached a regulatory agreement regarding its unresolved energy pricing dispute. This is followed by the formal filing of the consensus framework with the Colorado […]
